name: Spicy Apple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl mix flour, sugar, cinnamon, baking powder, and allspice; set aside.
2. In another bowl combine apples, apple juice concentrate, raisins, egg or egg whites, and oil.
3. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add the apple mixture.
4. Mix until the dry ingredients are just moistened.
5. Line muffin tins with paper liners.
6. Spoon batter into paper-lined muffin cups.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 20 to 25 minutes.
